interview.subject: Interview invitation for {{jobTitle}}
interview.body: Hello {{candidateName}}, your application for {{jobTitle}} has been shortlisted. We will contact you with interview details.

reject.subject: Application update for {{jobTitle}}
reject.body: Hello {{candidateName}}, thank you for applying for {{jobTitle}}. We are not moving forward at this time.

hold.subject: Application under review for {{jobTitle}}
hold.body: Hello {{candidateName}}, your application for {{jobTitle}} is still under review.
